product_highlights: SYLOID® - industry-benchmark silica brand for cosmetic texture
Exceptional oil absorption for long-lasting matte finish
Soft-focus properties for anti-aging and pore-minimizing effects
Broad range of particle sizes for different texture needs
Proven performance in skincare, color cosmetics, and sun care
notes: US-based specialty materials company with the SYLOID® silica brand — a benchmark for cosmetic texture modification. SYLOID® silicas provide exceptional mattifying, soft-focus, and oil absorption properties across skincare, color cosmetics, and sun care. Amorphous silica is a versatile texture modifier that improves consistency, provides silky feel, and controls shine in liquid and cream formulations.
